volume.name: Volume

skill1: Affects self when killing an enemy.

caveats: skill1: the kill-gated ATK ▲ 12.6% is unmodeled — it can never trigger against the raid boss (the boss does not die mid-fight)

cadence: fire rate / reload are unmeasured estimates (engine SMG default 20 pulls/s shipped; the raw datamine says 24 pulls/s, and reload_start_ammo 119 hints at rolling reload) — verify on a focus video
skill2/burst: escalating tiers reach full value only from her 3rd Full Burst / 3rd burst cast, and every modeled effect is burst-gated — the whole kit is inert in a team that cannot chain Full Bursts
